text: For the drainage field test package we recommend Gold Ram Engineering & Development Limited at HK$1,114,790. Gold Ram is a real Hong Kong ground-investigation contractor on the Development Bureau specialist list (Ground Investigation Field Work, Group II) with a 2026 Civil Engineering and Development Department ground-investigation term contract on the public record and no public risk flags. We recommend against the cautionary bidder GI-1 despite its bid being the lowest on the sheet at HK$1,020,590: the public record carries two safety-prosecution convictions at the Labour Department, a fatal flag that disqualifies it regardless of price. The bid leveling reaches the same conclusion on price alone, since GI-1 excluded the water supply (G14) and did not price the freeboard (G16); valued at the peer rate its like-for-like total is HK$1,125,890, above the recommended bid. No subcontractor schedule of rates was returned for this package, so the field-test bid figures are illustrative and are shown against the tender's own scheduled rates as the benchmark column; the cautionary firm GI-1 is fictional, and a person approves the award.
